summary: PR 2304 made small THP decoder changes in the Dolphin THP header and implementation: THP struct layout refinements, a THPInit signature/body adjustment, a 512x448 iMCU-row helper changed to take THPFileInfo* instead of reading __THPInfo directly, and several formatting/control-shape edits. The bot report showed net matched-code improvement and one new match, but also one broken match and one unmatched regression.

key_files.role: THP public/internal header declarations and recovered struct layout fields
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: extern/dolphin/include/dolphin/thp/thp.h added 10 deleted 8 hunks 4
raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab pad2[2] changed to pad2 plus num_Vij
raw_diff: THPComponent gained u8 _ before predDC
raw_diff: THPFileInfo pad2 changed from u32 array to byte array
raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 prototype changed to THPFileInfo*
raw_diff: THPInit declaration changed from BOOL to void

key_files.role: THP decoder implementation and matching-oriented source edits
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c added 41 deleted 37 hunks 9
raw_diff: __THPDecompressYUV passes __THPInfo into __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448
raw_diff: __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification writes huffmanTabs[tab_index].num_Vij
raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 now uses THPFileInfo* info throughout
raw_diff: THPInit body adds PPCMfhid2/DCInvalidateRange/LCEnable and OSInitFastCast, changes LC work offsets, returns void
text_corpus bot report: THPInit improved +111 bytes, __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY became 100%, __THPPrepBitStream broke from 100% to 99.96%

what_changed.text: Recovered a named THPHuffmanTab field num_Vij and changed the writer in __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification from pad2[1] to num_Vij.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab pad2[2] -> pad2 + u16 num_Vij
raw_diff: info->huffmanTabs[tab_index].pad2[1] = num_Vij -> num_Vij = num_Vij

what_changed.text: Adjusted THPComponent and THPFileInfo padding to byte-granular fields, including a leading u8 placeholder in THPComponent and a u8 pad2 byte array in THPFileInfo.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct _THPComponent gained u8 _
raw_diff: THPFileInfo pad2[(0x83d - 0x756) / 4] changed to u8 pad2[0x83d - 0x756]

what_changed.text: Changed __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 to accept THPFileInfo* info and replaced repeated direct __THPInfo accesses inside that helper with the parameter.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static void __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448(void) -> static void __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448(THPFileInfo* info)
raw_diff: caller changed to __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448(__THPInfo)
raw_diff: info->MCUsPerRow, info->components, info->quantTabs, info->RST, info->currMCU, info->nMCU, info->cnt replace __THPInfo uses

what_changed.text: Changed THPInit from BOOL-returning to void-returning in both header and source, removed __THPInitFlag assignment and TRUE return, enabled OSInitFastCast call, and added low-level cache/locked-cache setup guarded by PPCMfhid2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: BOOL THPInit(void) -> void THPInit(void)
raw_diff: if (!(PPCMfhid2() & 0x10000000)) { DCInvalidateRange((u8*)(0xE0000000), 0x4000); LCEnable(); }
raw_diff: //OSInitFastCast(); -> OSInitFastCast();
raw_diff: removed __THPInitFlag = TRUE and return TRUE; added return;

what_changed.text: Adjusted THPLCWork672 offset increments from 0x2A00/0xA80 to 0x2800/0xA00 before the final 0xA80 increment.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: base += 0x2A00 -> base += 0x2800
raw_diff: base += 0xA80 -> base += 0xA00

what_changed.text: Included several brace/formatting changes around else and loop braces that affected reported matching status for THPDec functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: else brace formatting in THPVideoDecode and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompU
raw_diff: for (k = 1; k < 64; k++) brace moved onto same line in __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY
text_corpus bot report: __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY became a new 100% match

smart_moves.text: Replacing pad2[1] with a named num_Vij field made the Huffman table count access self-documenting without changing the surrounding algorithm.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab num_Vij field addition
raw_diff: __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification writes num_Vij

smart_moves.text: Passing THPFileInfo* into the 512x448 row decompressor localized state access and aligned it with nearby decode helpers that already take THPFileInfo* parameters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY/U/V prototypes take THPFileInfo*
raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 signature and body changed to use info

smart_moves.text: The PR kept header and implementation signatures synchronized for THPInit and __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: thp.h prototype changes
raw_diff: THPDec.c definition/callsite changes

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a padding slot is demonstrably used as a real value, promote that slot into a typed/named struct field and update accesses to the field.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab pad2[2] changed to pad2 plus u16 num_Vij
raw_diff: pad2[1] access replaced with num_Vij assignment

decomp_lessons.lesson: If a helper conceptually operates on a THPFileInfo and many callees already take that type, threading the THPFileInfo* parameter through the helper can be a plausible matching and readability tactic compared with repeated global reads.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: caller now passes __THPInfo
raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 replaces repeated __THPInfo member accesses with info member accesses
raw_diff: Huffman decode helpers take THPFileInfo*

decomp_lessons.lesson: Header prototype updates should accompany recovered implementation signature changes in the same PR slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: thp.h and THPDec.c both change THPInit to void
raw_diff: thp.h and THPDec.c both change __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 to take THPFileInfo*

naming_conventions.text: num_Vij was introduced as a named THPHuffmanTab field for a count previously stored through padding.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: u16 num_Vij added to THPHuffmanTab
raw_diff: assignment to info->huffmanTabs[tab_index].num_Vij

naming_conventions.text: Existing THP naming style in this slice uses double-underscore internal helpers such as __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY, while preserving THP-prefix exported functions such as THPVideoDecode and THPInit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static helper prototypes in thp.h
raw_diff: THPVideoDecode and THPInit declarations

naming_conventions.text: The placeholder field name '_' was added to THPComponent; this is evidence of unresolved layout padding, not a semantic name.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct _THPComponent gained u8 _

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Thread an existing global state pointer into a helper as an explicit parameter to alter access/codegen shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448(__THPInfo)
raw_diff: helper body uses info-> fields instead of __THPInfo-> fields
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: The bot report did not show this helper as newly matched; treat as a candidate tactic, not proven general guidance.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use byte-granular padding for struct layout when offsets are not word-aligned or when later fields require exact byte positioning.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPFileInfo pad2 changed from u32 array expression to u8 pad2[0x83d - 0x756]
raw_diff: THPComponent gained u8 _ before THPCoeff predDC
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: The slice does not include explicit offset verification, so this remains grounded only in the diff and reported score movement.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Small brace-format changes can affect MWCC matching for tight decode loops and branch structures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for-loop brace change in __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY
raw_diff: else brace changes in THPVideoDecode and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompU
text_corpus bot report: __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY changed from 99.99% to 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: The evidence correlates the PR with the match report but does not isolate which edit caused each score change.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: THPInit matching work included restoring low-level SDK-like initialization calls and exact LC work-buffer offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PPCMfhid2/DCInvalidateRange/LCEnable added
raw_diff: OSInitFastCast uncommented
raw_diff: THPLCWork672 offsets changed
text_corpus bot report: THPInit improved from 10.60% to 32.12%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: No reviewer explanation or objdiff details are included beyond the bot percentage report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Promote proven padding accesses into typed fields
accepted_candidate_records.text: In THPDec, a THPHuffmanTab padding-array access pad2[1] was replaced by a named u16 field num_Vij, and the writer in __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification was updated accordingly. This is a graph-safe candidate illustrating typed fields over padding when the value role is visible in code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab pad2[2] -> u32 pad2 plus u16 num_Vij
raw_diff: pad2[1] assignment -> num_Vij assignment

accepted_candidate_records.title: Explicit state parameter instead of repeated global reads
accepted_candidate_records.text: The 512x448 THP iMCU-row helper was changed to take THPFileInfo* and use info-> fields, with the caller passing __THPInfo. This may be useful as a searchable matching tactic in THP-like SDK code, but the slice does not prove broad applicability.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 signature/callsite/body changes

source_update_candidates.title: THPDec path belongs to Dolphin THP external SDK decoder area
source_update_candidates.text: The PR modifies extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c and extern/dolphin/include/dolphin/thp/thp.h, classified in the slice as external-sdk and centered on Dolphin THP decoder code.
evidence_refs: metadata_json initial_classification systems: external-sdk
changed_files.jsonl: THPDec.c and thp.h paths
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future path classification for THP decoder PRs; curator should verify against current source ownership before adding.

source_update_candidates.title: SDK-like low-level init changes need narrow regression evidence
source_update_candidates.text: This PR changed THPInit low-level cache/LC setup and work-buffer offsets and received a mixed bot report with improvements plus regressions. A possible standards note is to require narrow verification when restoring SDK-like initialization sequences because small low-level changes can perturb nearby matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPInit adds PPCMfhid2/DCInvalidateRange/LCEnable, OSInitFastCast, and offset changes
text_corpus bot report: THPInit improved but __THPPrepBitStream broke and __THPReadScaneHeader regressed
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with existing verification standards, but the PR alone is not enough to create a new accepted global rule.

rejection_notes: Do not treat PR 2304 as an accepted or merged precedent; metadata shows state CLOSED and merged_at null.
Do not infer that changing THPInit to void is globally correct from this slice alone; there is no human rationale or acceptance evidence.
Do not claim OSRegisterVersion should be removed in THPInit generally; the diff only shows a commented-out call being replaced by other initialization work.
Do not claim brace style alone caused the __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY match; the bot report does not isolate causality.
Do not promote the placeholder field name '_' as a naming convention beyond unresolved padding.
